title: FurnitureMart Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: FurnitureMart Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FurnitureMart Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About FurnitureMart Holdings Services:
FurnitureMart Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FurnitureMart Holdings Services!
